data.title: Bitcoin Legislation Advances: Arizona Moves Closer to Crypto Reserves
data.description:
Arizona is advancing two key Bitcoin reserve bills, SB 1373 and SB 1025, positioning itself as a leader in state-level cryptocurrency adoption.

The post Bitcoin Legislation Advances: Arizona Moves Closer to Crypto Reserves first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/02/28/arizona-closer-to-bitcoin-reserves/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=arizona-closer-to-bitcoin-reserves

data.title: A new address withdrew about 96,000 SOL from Binance and pledged all of them to Jito
data.description: Spot On Chain monitoring shows that a newly created wallet address withdrew 96,128 SOL (worth about $12.37 million) from Binance at a price of $128.6 and pledged all of it in Jito. It is worth noting that this address is associated with another whale address, which sold a batch of SOL at a higher price of $140.8 about 3 days ago. These SOLs made a profit of $4.58 million (51% return) after being pledged for one year.

data.title: Upbit NFT adds 5 new collectibles trading and deposit and withdrawal services
data.description: According to the official announcement, UpbitNFT will open trading and deposit/withdrawal services for 5 new collectibles on February 28, 2025, including Pirate Nation-Founder's Pirates (PIRATE), Yawanawa and Refik Anadol's Winds of Yawanawa (YAWANAWA). Users can deposit and withdraw NFTs through registered Metamask. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Celestia Founder Proposes Temporary Increase In DA Fees
data.description: According to Odaily, Celestia founder Mustafa Al-Bassam has proposed a temporary fourfold increase in Data Availability (DA) fees. This suggestion was made in a governance forum to test the price discovery of DA fees while maintaining overall costs at a relatively low level, approximately $0.00008 per Rollup transaction.

data.title: Binance will launch multiple USDC perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the KAITO/USDC perpetual contract at 10:00 (UTC) on March 5, 2025, and the IP/USDC perpetual contract at 10:15 (UTC) on March 5, 2025. In addition, Binance will also launch the TRUMP/USDC perpetual contract at 10:00 (UTC) on March 6, 2025, and the ADA/USDC perpetual contract at 10:15 (UTC) on March 6, 2025. The PNUT/USDC perpetual contract will be launched at 10:00 (UTC) on March 7, 2025, and the HBAR/USDC perpetual contract will be launched at 10:15 (UTC) on March 7, 2025. All contracts support up to 25 times leverage. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Gate.io pre-market OTC trading is now available WORLD3 (WAI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io pre-market OTC trading has officially launched WORLD3 (WAI) at 15:00 (UTC+8) on February 28, 2025, providing users with a convenient channel to participate in the WORLD3 ecosystem.
It is reported that WORLD3 is a self-evolving, AI and blockchain-driven autonomous world that aims to allow humans and artificial intelligence to prosper together.

data.title: U.S. SEC Declares Memecoins Are Not Securities, Investors Must Assume Full Risk
data.description: U.S. SEC Declares Memecoins Are Not Securities, Investors Must Assume Full RiskThe U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has clarified its stance on memecoins, stating that these digital assets do not qualify as securities and are more akin to collectibles. The guidance, issued by the SEC’s Corporate Finance Supervision Department, confirms that memecoin transactions do not fall under the purview of federal securities laws, meaning investors are not afforded the same protections as traditional securities holders.Key Takeaways from the SEC’s Guidance on MemecoinsMemecoins Are Not Securities: The SEC asserts that the sale and purchase of memecoins do not constitute securities transactions, exempting them from registration under the Securities Act of 1933.No Registration Required: Unlike stocks, bonds, or other regulated investment vehicles, memecoins can be offered and sold without SEC registration or exemption filings.Investor Risk: The SEC cautions that memecoin holders are not protected by federal securities laws, meaning they bear full responsibility for potential losses, fraud risks, and market volatility.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 79,000 USDT with a 8.69% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 28, 2025, 07:48 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 79,000 USDT and is now trading at 78,988.78125 USDT, with a narrowed 8.69% decrease in 24 hours.
